symptom: ad-hoc el.value= writes save blank; final submit rejects 'There is a problem'
cause: evaluate 500 is spurious for the DOM mutation, but el.value= does NOT update Knockout's viewmodel
fix: fill fields ONLY via tal_eform.py / tal_sec2.py with a spec (prototype-setter updates the model)

symptom: S2 personal-statement field NO_FIELD / 'Enter your personal statement'
cause: S2 field IDs are CAMPAIGN-SPECIFIC, not universal (BA uses 72158, UKEF uses 72117)
fix: map the target S2 eform's pages+field ids first (dump per page), then write a per-eform S2 spec; only CV (99856/99863) + declaration (205967/76575) are reusable
mint a fresh SID via scripts/csj_search.py; only log/navigate stable jobs.cgi?jcode=<id> URLs
